input:
The Prophet therefore raised a force of 1, men of his companions and marched northwards with them. They marched at night and encamped during the day so that they could take their enemy by surprise. It was a long journey, taking nights to cover the distance. An expert guide was employed to show them the way. The Muslims were indeed able to take their enemies by surprise and swept through their encampments. Thus the forces which were raised to attack Madinah were left with no choice but to flee.
Source: Adil Salahi, Muhammad: Man and Prophet, Ch. 23: Consolidation

output.source_reference: Adil Salahi, Muhammad: Man and Prophet, Ch. 23: Consolidation

characters.name: Prophet Muhammad (PBUH)
characters.appearance: Early 50s, medium build, dignified upright posture. Wearing a simple white thobe with a beige cloak draped over shoulders, white turban with tail between shoulder blades. Simple leather sandals. Always shown from behind, face never visible. Distinguished by beige cloak and subtle warm light.

characters.name: Sahabi Leader
characters.appearance: Late 30s, light brown skin, athletic build, tall stature. Thick beard with dark hair and slight stubble, neatly kept. Wearing dark brown woolen cloak, off-white cotton thobe, plain white cloth wrapped as loose head covering. Worn leather sandals. Determined, focused expression.

characters.name: Sahabi Soldier
characters.appearance: Mid 20s, medium olive skin, lean build, youthful face. Short beard with dark hair, neatly kept. Wearing off-white cotton thobe, plain brown woolen cloak, simple white cloth wrapped as loose head covering. Worn leather sandals. Energetic, alert expression.

output.moral_lesson: Planned effort and teamwork can lead to great success and victory.
output.narrative_text: The Prophet gathered his companions and marched towards their enemy at night, camping during the day to take them by surprise. The Muslims were able to defeat their enemies and win the battle.

compliance.notes: The Prophet is shown from behind, and the soldiers are shown with full faces. The scene is set at night, with a subtle warm light, and is free from any graphic violence or modern objects.

output.image_prompt: Children's watercolor illustration. A moonlit night in the Arabian Desert, with a group of men marching in the distance. The Prophet is seen from behind, standing atop a small dune, with a faint warm light behind him. In the foreground, a young Sahabi soldier is shown in a dark blue thobe, brown cloak, and simple white cloth head covering, looking back at the group with determination. Another Sahabi leader is shown in the background, standing on a rocky outcrop, with a dark brown cloak and off-white thobe, gazing out at the horizon. The night sky is a deep blue, with a crescent moon shining brightly. Medium shot, eye level. Muted color palette with shades of blue and green. No modern objects.
